meaning: n.迫切,急迫,迫近的危险(或祸患)
examples: The research of drug safety is imminence to all of us.
These nouns all denote the agitation and anxiety caused by the presence or imminence of danger.
The public has now endured a decade of dire warnings about the imminence of a terrorist atomic attack.
Another thing that has changed is the assessment of the imminence of the nuclear threat from Iran.
The announcement led to bold claims about the imminence of computer-aided translation.
